//Clerk: Public Clerk metadata for future JWT validation (#12). Supply real values via env vars (Clerk__Authority, Clerk__JwksUrl, ...) or user-secrets. No secret key lives here.
//Ai: Claude/Anthropic integration (#36). Ai__ApiKey is a SERVER-SIDE secret and MUST NOT be committed — supply it via env var (Ai__ApiKey) or user-secrets. Only the non-secret model/base-url defaults are shipped here.
//CoachChat: Authenticated coach chat (#39). Per-user send rate limit (PermitLimit per WindowSeconds) — also the per-user budget for the consolidated coach LLM policy (#45, chat/meal-suggestions/nudge) — plus inbound message cap and how many recent messages are replayed to the model for context. All non-secret.
//RateLimiting: Global API rate limiting + abuse protection (#45). The global limiter applies to every request, partitioned by authenticated user (else client IP); health-check and OpenAPI paths are exempt. Coach LLM endpoints use a stricter per-user policy driven by CoachChat above. All non-secret; tune per environment.
//OpenFoodFacts: Open Food Facts nutrition lookup (#20). All values are non-secret. Open Food Facts requires a descriptive User-Agent on every request. CacheTtlDays is the staleness window for cached barcode lookups.
